name: Hot Chicken & Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 (4 oz.) Boned, Skinned Chicken Breast Halves, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine paprika, pepper, and a pinch of salt in a plastic bag. Add chicken and shake to coat.
2. Set aside.
3. Place apple cider vinegar in an 8-inch square baking dish; microwave at high for 30-45 seconds.
4. Add chicken; cover with wax paper and microwave at medium-high for 6 to 7 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
5. Drain chicken and set aside. Reserve the reserved apple cider mixture.
6. In the baking dish, add carrots; cover with plastic wrap and vent. Microwave at high for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in apples; microwave at high for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes, or until apples are tender. Drain.
8. Combine apples, carrots, chicken, and 1/4 cup cheese in a bowl; toss and set aside.
9. Add vinegar and shallots to the reserved apple cider mixture in the baking dish; microwave at high for 1 minute.
10. Drizzle over the chicken mixture with the remaining 1/4 cup cheese and serve warm.
About 247 calories per 1 1/2 cups chicken mixture, 1 cup spinach, and 1 tablespoon cheese. (Fat: 6g, Cholesterol: 76.)
